## Checklist

- [ ] Branched off `main`; one focused change
- [ ] Conventional Commit message (e.g. `fix(install): ...`)
- [ ] Smoke-tested — verified actual behavior, not just that files parse
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or `.env` contents in the diff
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or setup changed
